title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
summary: Fed Governor Waller argues against fighting past inflation battles, noting that current inflation extends beyond traditional drivers like energy spikes and tariffs. The warning suggests interest rate hikes remain possible despite efforts to avoid repeating previous policy mistakes.
content: The Fed governor said inflation has expanded beyond the often-cited drivers such as the energy price spike in tariffs.

zh.title: 沃勒表示美联储不应该在通胀问题上"重蹈覆辙",但警告加息仍可能
zh.summary: 美联储理事沃勒主张不应重复过去的通胀应对错误,指出当前通胀超出了能源价格波动和关税等传统因素驱动的范围。他的警告表明,尽管有努力避免重复以往的政策失误,但加息仍然可能实施。

title: Trump recommends Lindsey Graham's sister serve as interim senator for South Carolina
summary: Following Senator Lindsey Graham's death, South Carolina Republicans are mobilizing for a special primary election. President Trump has recommended Graham's sister as an interim replacement, adding his influence to the succession process.
content: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

zh.title: 特朗普建议林赛·格雷厄姆的妹妹担任南卡罗来纳州临时参议员
zh.summary: 在参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世后,南卡罗来纳州共和党人正在为特殊初选做准备。特朗普总统建议格雷厄姆的妹妹担任临时替代者,在继任过程中发挥其影响力。

title: A streaming stock risks diving below its key support level this week. Here's what else Jay Woods is watching
summary: Netflix stock faces potential breakdown through a critical technical support level ahead of this week's earnings report, according to NYSE insider Jay Woods. His analysis highlights key price levels to watch as the streaming platform releases financial results.
content: NYSE insider Jay Woods is keeping an eye on Netflix in advance of its latest financial results due out later this week. Here's what else he's watching.

zh.title: 一支流媒体股票本周有跌破关键支撑位的风险。杰伊·伍兹还在关注什么
zh.summary: 纽约证交所知情人士杰伊·伍兹表示,Netflix股票在本周财报前面临突破关键技术支撑位的风险。他的分析强调了当这个流媒体平台发布财务业绩时需要关注的关键价格水平。

title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
summary: Trump has proposed implementing a 20% toll on cargo transiting the Strait of Hormuz and restarted a U.S. naval blockade against Iran. This move affects one of the world's most critical oil shipping lanes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions.
content: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

zh.title: 特朗普提议对霍尔木兹海峡货物征收20%关税；重启对伊朗封锁
zh.summary: 特朗普提议对通过霍尔木兹海峡的货物征收20%的关税，并重启了美国对伊朗的海军封锁。在持续的地缘政治紧张局势中，这一举措影响了世界上最关键的石油运输航道之一。

title: Protect your portfolio from volatility with these high-dividend stocks, Jefferies says
summary: Jefferies recommends high-dividend stocks as a defensive strategy for investors seeking portfolio protection during market volatility. These dividend-paying securities offer potential stability amid turbulent market conditions.
content: These stocks can help investors seek shelter from the rocky market, according to Jefferies.

zh.title: 杰富瑞建议用高股息股票保护您的投资组合免受波动影响
zh.summary: 杰富瑞建议投资者采用高股息股票作为防守策略，在市场波动期间保护投资组合。这些派息证券在动荡的市场条件下提供了潜在的稳定性。

title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
summary: A judge ruled that Trump's lawsuit against the IRS pursued an 'improper purpose' and referred his lawyer to the bar for discipline. The case, which settled with a controversial $1.8 billion 'lawfare' fund agreement, has been scrapped.
content: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.

zh.title: 法官称特朗普以"不正当目的"起诉国税局；建议将其律师转交律师协会
zh.summary: 一名法官裁定特朗普针对国税局的诉讼追求了"不正当目的"，并建议将其律师转交律师协会接受纪律处分。该案件最终以一项争议性的18亿美元"法律战争"基金协议和解，现已被撤销。

title: Meta and Amazon are leading a trillion-dollar Big Tech spending spree
summary: Meta and Amazon are leading major technology companies in a record-breaking capital spending surge driven by AI infrastructure investments. Morgan Stanley projects Big Tech capex will hit all-time highs as companies compete to build AI capabilities.
content: As the cost of AI infrastructure continues to increase, Morgan Stanley says Big Tech capital expenditures are on track to hit new records.

zh.title: Meta和亚马逊领导科技巨头万亿美元支出狂欢
zh.summary: Meta和亚马逊正领导主要科技公司实现破纪录的资本支出激增，这由人工智能基础设施投资驱动。摩根士丹利预测科技巨头资本开支将创历史新高，因为公司竞相构建人工智能能力。

title: UN maritime agency opposes Hormuz transit fees after Trump demands protection money
summary: The UN maritime agency has opposed Trump's proposed transit fees through the Strait of Hormuz, calling them 'protection money.' The opposition comes as security deteriorates following Iranian attacks on commercial vessels in the critical shipping lane.
content: The security situation in Hormuz has deteriorated since Iran attacked multiple commercial ships transiting the strait over the past week.

zh.title: 联合国海事机构反对霍尔木兹海峡过境费，特朗普要求"保护费"
zh.summary: 联合国海事机构已反对特朗普提议的通过霍尔木兹海峡的过境费，称其为"保护费"。随着伊朗对这条关键航运通道的商业船舶进行攻击导致安全局势恶化，反对意见随之而来。

title: Paramount and Warner Bros sued to block $110bn mega merger
summary: A dozen U.S. states have filed lawsuits to block a $110 billion merger between Paramount and Warner Bros., challenging the largest media consolidation in Hollywood history. The legal action seeks to prevent the combination of two major entertainment conglomerates.
content: A dozen US states are taking legal action to halt the largest media consolidation in Hollywood history.

zh.title: Paramount和华纳兄弟因1100亿美元合并案被诉
zh.summary: 十几个美国州提起诉讼阻止Paramount和华纳兄弟之间的1100亿美元合并，挑战好莱坞历史上最大的媒体整合。该法律诉讼旨在阻止这两个主要娱乐集团的合并。

title: Global oil prices top $82 a barrel, heading for biggest jump in 3 months after Trump reimposes Strait of Hormuz blockade
summary: Oil prices have climbed above $82 per barrel, marking their largest three-month jump following Trump's reimposition of the Strait of Hormuz blockade. The surge reflects increased geopolitical uncertainty and supply constraints from the critical shipping route.
content: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices after President Donald Trump reimposed the naval blockage on the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 全球油价突破每桶82美元，特朗普重新实施霍尔木兹海峡封锁后迎来三个月来最大涨幅
zh.summary: 油价已攀升至每桶82美元以上，在特朗普重新实施霍尔木兹海峡封锁后创造了三个月来最大涨幅。此次上涨反映了地缘政治不确定性增加和关键海运路线供应受限的影响。

title: Inflation is primed to fall for the first time in 6 years. Will high prices drop too?
summary: U.S. inflation is expected to decline for the first time in six years after reaching a three-year peak, but consumer prices are unlikely to fall significantly. The disconnect between falling inflation and continued high costs presents a challenging economic reality for Americans.
content: A surge in U.S. inflation to a three-year high has begun to recede, but life isn’t going to get more affordable for Americans anytime soon.

zh.title: 通胀六年来首次准备下降，高物价会随之下跌吗？
zh.summary: 美国通胀在达到三年高位后预计将首次下跌，这将是六年来的首次下降，但消费者物价不太可能大幅下降。通胀下降与物价持续高企之间的脱节为美国人呈现了一个具有挑战性的经济现实。

title: CNBC Points Pro: How to book a flight to France with points
summary: Points expert Jason Stauffer offers guidance on using rewards points and miles to book flights to France. The advice helps travelers maximize their loyalty program benefits for international travel.
content: Points expert Jason Stauffer explains how to use points and miles to fly to France.

zh.title: CNBC Points Pro：如何用积分预订前往法国的航班
zh.summary: 积分专家杰森·斯塔弗提供了有关如何使用奖励积分和里程来预订前往法国航班的指导。该建议帮助旅客最大化利用其会员计划的福利来进行国际旅行。

title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
summary: SpaceX stock has fallen for a second consecutive day, approaching its initial public offering price of $135 per share. The decline comes despite the company's recent addition to the Nasdaq-100 index following its record IPO just a month ago.
content: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.

zh.title: SpaceX股票连续第二天下跌，接近135美元IPO价格
zh.summary: SpaceX股票连续第二天下跌，接近其每股135美元的首次公开募股价格。尽管该公司在一个月前创纪录的首次公开募股后最近被纳入纳斯达克100指数，但股价仍在下降。

title: Trump administration urges banks to scrutinize lending to immigrants without work authorization
summary: The Trump administration has directed federal bank regulators to restrict lending to immigrants without work authorization, targeting mortgages, auto loans, and other consumer credit. The guidance represents a policy shift aimed at limiting access to credit for undocumented immigrants.
content: Federal bank regulators issued guidance Monday seeking to curb mortgages, auto loans and other consumer credit to immigrants without U.S. work authorization.

zh.title: 特朗普政府敦促银行仔细审查对无工作授权移民的贷款
zh.summary: 特朗普政府指示联邦银行监管机构限制对无工作授权移民的贷款，包括抵押贷款、汽车贷款和其他消费信贷。该指导意见代表了一项旨在限制无证移民获得信贷的政策转变。

title: A hot inflation reading this week could mean a rate hike soon, Fed’s Waller says
summary: Fed Governor Christopher Waller cautioned that weak inflation readings this week could necessitate interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. The warning indicates the central bank remains ready to tighten monetary policy if inflation fails to cool as expected.
content: There is a chance the Federal Reserve will need to raise interest rates soon if inflation readings this week disappoint, Fed governor Christopher Waller said Monday.

zh.title: 本周如果通胀数据较高，美联储主席沃勒表示可能很快加息
zh.summary: 美联储主席克里斯托弗·沃勒警告称，本周疲弱的通胀数据可能需要美联储加息。这一警告表明美联储如果通胀未能如预期冷却，仍准备收紧货币政策。

title: New Zealand actor Sam Neill dies aged 78
summary: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor best known for playing Dr. Alan Grant in 'Jurassic Park,' has died at age 78. His passing marks the loss of a significant figure in cinema history and iconic contributions to the blockbuster franchise.
content: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor best known for playing paleontologist Dr. Alan Grant in dinosaur blockbuster "Jurassic Park" has died at the age of 78.

zh.title: 新西兰演员山姆·尼尔去世，享年78岁
zh.summary: 新西兰演员山姆·尼尔去世，享年78岁。他因在《侏罗纪公园》中饰演艾伦·格兰特博士而闻名。他的去世标志着电影史上一位重要人物的离世，以及对这部大片标志性贡献的消失。

title: U.S. oil jumps above $75 a barrel after Trump reinstates Strait of Hormuz blockade on Iranian ships
summary: U.S. oil prices surged above $75 per barrel following Trump's reinstatement of a blockade on Iranian ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The dispute over the critical shipping route's accessibility has driven market volatility amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions.
content: The U.S. and Iran disputed whether Hormuz was open to ship traffic after trading strikes over the weekend.

zh.title: 特朗普重启霍尔木兹海峡对伊朗船只封锁后，美国油价跃升至每桶75美元以上
zh.summary: 特朗普重新启动了对伊朗船只通过霍尔木兹海峡的封锁后，美国油价跃升至每桶75美元以上。围绕这一关键航道通行权的纠纷推动了市场波动，同时美伊紧张局势不断升级。

title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
summary: Meta announced the Hyperion data center supercluster in Louisiana will cost more than $50 billion and provide 5GW of capacity. The massive infrastructure investment is being bolstered by substantial state tax incentives.
content: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.

zh.title: Meta在路易斯安那州的数据中心投资将达500亿美元，受惠于慷慨的税收激励
zh.summary: Meta宣布在路易斯安那州的Hyperion数据中心超级集群投资将超过500亿美元，提供5吉瓦的容量。这项大规模基础设施投资得到了州政府慷慨税收激励的支持。

title: I’m a bartender, yoga teacher and freelance consultant. How can I budget with such an unpredictable income?
summary: A freelancer managing income from bartending, yoga teaching, and consulting seeks strategies for budgeting with unpredictable earnings. The article addresses how to make sound financial decisions despite variable monthly income.
content: ‘Is there a smart way to manage irregular income without feeling like every financial decision is a gamble?’

zh.title: 我是酒保、瑜伽教练和自由顾问。我如何用这样不可预测的收入预算？
zh.summary: 一位管理来自调酒、瑜伽教学和咨询收入的自由职业者寻求针对不可预测收入的预算策略。该文章讨论了如何在月收入可变的情况下做出合理的财务决定。

title: The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
summary: CNBC's annual America's Top States for Business rankings identify ten states with the strongest economies based on key performance metrics. Economic strength is a central category in determining which states offer the most favorable business climates.
content: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

zh.title: 2026年美国十大经济强州
zh.summary: CNBC年度《美国商业最佳州》排名根据关键绩效指标确定了十个经济最强的州。经济实力是确定哪些州提供最有利的商业环境的中心类别。

title: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
summary: CNBC's America's Top States for Business study highlights ten states struggling with the weakest economies. The analysis reveals significant regional disparities in economic performance across the country.
content: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

zh.title: 2026年美国十大经济最差州
zh.summary: CNBC的《美国商业最佳州》研究强调了十个经济最弱的州。该分析揭示了全国经济表现中存在的显著地区差异。

title: Is there a deadline to claim the $1,000 ‘Trump account’ contribution for my kid?
summary: Parents are seeking clarification on deadlines for claiming $1,000 'Trump account' contributions for children, with some families eligible for an initial $250 government matching contribution. The article explains eligibility and timing requirements.
content: Some children who don’t qualify for the government contribution may be eligible for an initial $250.

zh.title: 申领孩子的1000美元'特朗普账户'补助有截止期限吗？
zh.summary: 家长们正在寻求关于为孩子申领1000美元'特朗普账户'补助期限的说明，其中部分家庭符合资格获得初始250美元政府配套补助。该文章解释了申领资格和时间要求。

title: Stock pickers know they can’t outsmart the market. That doesn’t stop them from trying.
summary: Professional stock pickers acknowledge their inability to consistently beat the market, yet continue attempting active investment strategies. The article explores how investors can balance the desire for active participation with maintaining long-term financial objectives.
content: How to satisfy your inner trader without derailing your long-term investment goals.

zh.title: 选股人知道自己无法战胜市场，但他们仍在尝试
zh.summary: 专业选股人承认自己无法持续战胜市场，但仍在继续尝试积极投资策略。该文章探讨了投资者如何在保持主动参与的欲望与维持长期财务目标之间取得平衡。

title: Paramount-WBD merger expected to face lawsuit from multiple states, sources say
summary: Multiple state attorneys general are expected to file lawsuits challenging the proposed merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery. The regulatory challenges underscore ongoing antitrust concerns over media industry consolidation.
content: Multiple state attorneys general are expected to file a lawsuit challenging the merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery, David Faber reports.

zh.title: 消息人士称Paramount-WBD合并预计将面临多州诉讼
zh.summary: 多个州检察长预计将提起诉讼，质疑Paramount Skydance与华纳兄弟探索公司之间拟议的合并。监管挑战突显了对媒体行业整合持续存在的反垄断顾虑。

title: Buy the dip on this Chinese EV maker that's poised for a comeback, says Goldman Sachs
summary: Goldman Sachs upgraded a Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer to 'buy' from 'neutral,' signaling confidence in the company's comeback prospects. The upgrade reflects optimism about the EV maker's turnaround despite recent market weakness.
content: The investment bank upgraded the EV name to buy from neutral.

zh.title: 高盛称这家中国电动汽车制造商有望东山再起，建议逢低买入
zh.summary: 高盛将一家中国电动汽车制造商从"中性"升级为"买入"，表明对该公司复兴前景的信心。该升级反映了对这家电动汽车制造商在最近市场疲软中实现转机的乐观预期。

title: These biggest and ‘least loved’ stocks are the ones to pick ahead of earnings
summary: Evercore ISI identifies undervalued and overlooked large-cap stocks as positioned for gains as earnings season approaches. The firm expects strong profit growth to overcome investor concerns about artificial intelligence and drive S&P 500 gains.
content: Profit growth will overcome artificial intelligence concerns and lift the S&P 500, says Evercore ISI.

zh.title: 在财报季前，这些最大的"最不受欢迎"股票是值得选择的
zh.summary: Evercore ISI在财报季来临前找出被低估和被忽视的大盘股，预期这些股票有望上涨。该公司预计强劲的利润增长将克服投资者对人工智能的顾虑，并推动标普500指数上升。

title: Why prediction markets like Polymarket and Kalshi often fail the average investor
summary: Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets often disappoint average investors despite their theoretical advantages. The article examines why success from major traders in prediction markets does not reliably translate to gains for retail participants.
content: Big traders don’t always know best.

zh.title: 为什么Polymarket和Kalshi等预测市场经常让普通投资者失望
zh.summary: 尽管Polymarket和Kalshi预测市场在理论上有优势，但它们经常让普通投资者失望。该文章探讨了为什么大型交易者在预测市场中的成功不能可靠地转化为零售参与者的收益。

title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
summary: A 67-year-old with a $140,000 pension evaluates the strategic benefits of delaying Social Security claims until age 70 to maximize survivor benefits for his spouse. The decision involves weighing immediate income needs against enhanced long-term spousal protection.
content: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

zh.title: 我已67岁，拥有14万美元养老金。我应该等到70岁才领社会保障，以便妻子获得更多福利吗？
zh.summary: 一名67岁的养老金领取者评估延迟至70岁领取社会保障的战略好处，以最大化配偶的遗属福利。该决定涉及权衡当前收入需求与增强的长期配偶保护。

title: Stocks could get hit by a seasonal correction, Oppenheimer warns
summary: Oppenheimer warns that seasonal market patterns could trigger a correction pushing the S&P 500 back toward 7,000. The cautionary outlook highlights potential vulnerability to normal market cycles despite recent gains.
content: Oppenheimer warned there is the "risk of a seasonal correction" taking the S&P 500 all the way back toward 7,000.

zh.title: 股市可能遭遇季节性调整，奥本海默警告
zh.summary: 奥本海默警告季节性市场模式可能引发调整，使标普500指数回落至7000点附近。这一谨慎的前景突显了尽管近期涨幅不错，市场仍容易受到正常周期波动的影响。

title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
summary: Major U.S. banks are positioned to report strong Q2 revenues driven by the SpaceX IPO, Iran geopolitical tensions, and rebounding commercial lending. The convergence of these factors creates a favorable earnings environment for Wall Street institutions.
content: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."

zh.title: 大型银行准备报告由SpaceX IPO和伊朗战争波动推动的强劲收入
zh.summary: 美国主要银行有望报告强劲的第二季度收入，由SpaceX IPO、伊朗地缘政治紧张局势和商业贷款反弹推动。这些因素的汇聚为华尔街机构创造了有利的盈利环境。

title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
summary: A couple faces a decision after their 2011 Ford Fiesta is totaled: accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or surrender the car for $2,700 in salvage value. With significant damage including a bent hood, cracked radiator, and destroyed bumper, the choice hinges on which option provides better financial recovery.
content: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

zh.title: 我妻子的2011年福特嘉年华被全损。我们应该接受2000美元的保险赔偿还是放弃这辆车换取2700美元的废品价值？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇在他们的2011年福特嘉年华全损后面临一个决定：接受2000美元的保险赔偿或将车辆交出以换取2700美元的废品价值。由于包括引擎盖弯曲、散热器破裂和保险杠损毁等重大损伤，选择取决于哪个选项能提供更好的经济回报。

title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
summary: SK Hynix shares dropped 15% in Seoul trading just one day after a successful U.S. depositary receipt listing, exposing the South Korean chipmaker's vulnerability to geopolitical shocks. The rapid decline underscores the company's operational leverage and exposure to regional tensions.
content: Just one trading session after a highly successful U.S. listing for its depositary receipts, local shares in South Korean chip maker SK Hynix plummeted 15% on the domestic exchange in Seoul.

zh.title: 地缘政治冲击在SK海力士火爆美国存托凭证首次亮相后暴露其杠杆风险
zh.summary: SK海力士股票在成功美国存托凭证上市仅一天后在首尔交易中下跌15%，暴露了这家韩国芯片制造商对地缘政治冲击的脆弱性。这次迅速下滑强调了该公司的经营杠杆和对地区紧张局势的敞口。

title: TSMC just reported a record month for revenue ahead of critical earnings report on Thursday
summary: Taiwan's TSMC reported a record June revenue of $13.2 billion, representing a 67% increase month-over-month. The strong results set expectations high for the company's upcoming second-quarter earnings announcement.
content: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. said net revenue increased by 67% in June to $13.2 billion

zh.title: 台积电报告了创纪录的月度收入，为关键的周四财报做准备
zh.summary: 台湾台积电报告6月创纪录的收入达132亿美元，环比增长67%。这些强劲的业绩为公司即将发布的第二季度财报奠定了高期望。

title: U.S. and Iran exchange strikes as Strait of Hormuz standoff escalates
summary: The U.S. military conducted fresh strikes against Iranian forces, prompting Iran to retaliate with attacks on American military bases across the Gulf region. The escalating confrontation raises concerns about regional stability and shipping security in a critical waterway.
content: Iran responded to a fresh wave of strikes by U.S. forces by launching an attack on American military bases in several Gulf states.

zh.title: 美伊交换打击，霍尔木兹海峡对峙升级
zh.summary: 美军对伊朗力量进行了新的打击，促使伊朗对海湾地区的美军基地进行报复性攻击。这场不断升级的对抗引发了人们对地区稳定性和这一关键水道航运安全的担忧。

title: Tennis star Jessica Pegula is a billionaire heiress — here’s a look at her family’s vast property portfolio
summary: Tennis champion Jessica Pegula comes from the billionaire Pegula family, worth an estimated $9.3 billion, which owns the Buffalo Bills among other sports franchises and extensive real estate holdings. The article explores her family's impressive portfolio of assets and properties.
content: In addition to the Buffalo Bills, the Pegula family—which is worth an estimated $9.3 billion—also owns two other teams and an impressive collection of real estate.

zh.title: 网球明星杰西卡·佩古拉是亿万富翁继承人——看看她家族庞大的房产组合
zh.summary: 网球冠军杰西卡·佩古拉来自身家估计为93亿美元的亿万富翁佩古拉家族，该家族拥有水牛城比尔队等多个体育特许权和大量房地产。这篇文章探讨了她家族印象深刻的资产和房产组合。

title: Helen Mirren relists her longtime Hollywood Hills estate for $13 million after big renovation
summary: Acclaimed actress Helen Mirren is relisting her long-owned Hollywood Hills home for $13 million following a major renovation. The new asking price represents a significant discount from its previous listing, offering potential buyers the opportunity to acquire a piece of the star's California real estate.
content: Acclaimed actress Helen Mirren is giving buyers another chance to own a piece of her own illustrious Hollywood history—this time with a multimillion-dollar discount.

zh.title: 海伦·米伦大翻新后以1300万美元重新上市她的好莱坞山庄产业
zh.summary: 备受赞誉的女演员海伦·米伦在进行大翻新后，以1300万美元重新上市她长期拥有的好莱坞山庄。新的要价比之前的挂牌价格有大幅下降，为潜在买家提供了获得这位影星加州房产的机会。

title: There’s good and bad news if you want to copy JPMorgan’s new AI agent that outperforms the 60/40 portfolio
summary: JPMorgan has developed an AI agent capable of outperforming the traditional 60/40 investment portfolio while reducing risk through market and economic data analysis. However, there are both advantages and disadvantages to implementing this strategy for individual investors.
content: JPMorgan says it’s designed an artificial-intelligent agent to evaluate markets and economic data and use it to outperform the standard 60/40 investing model, with less risk to boot.

zh.title: 如果您想复制摩根大通新推出的超越60/40投资组合的人工智能代理，有好消息也有坏消息
zh.summary: 摩根大通开发了一个人工智能代理，能够通过市场和经济数据分析超越传统的60/40投资组合，同时降低风险。然而，对于个人投资者来说，实施这一策略既有优势也有劣势。

title: Europe's Anduril rival Helsing raises $1.8 billion at $18 billion valuation
summary: Helsing, a European defense technology company competing with Anduril, secured $1.8 billion in funding at an $18 billion valuation. Strong investor demand exceeded available allocation, signaling market confidence in the company's growth prospects.
content: Helsing said "investor demand significantly exceeded the available allocation" for its $1.8 billion funding round.

zh.title: 欧洲Anduril竞争对手Helsing以180亿美元估值融资18亿美元
zh.summary: 欧洲国防科技公司Helsing与Anduril竞争，以180亿美元的估值获得了18亿美元的融资。强劲的投资者需求超过了可用配额，表明市场对该公司增长前景充满信心。

title: TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker, reports 68% surge in June revenue
summary: TSMC, the world's leading contract chipmaker, reported a 68% surge in June revenue ahead of formal quarterly results. The strong performance reflects robust global demand for semiconductor manufacturing capacity.
content: Ahead of its second-quarter earnings, TSMC reported its June and first-half revenue for 2026.

zh.title: 全球最大代工芯片制造商台积电报告6月收入增长68%
zh.summary: 全球领先的代工芯片制造商台积电报告6月收入增长68%，先于正式季度结果。强劲的业绩反映了全球对半导体代工产能的强劲需求。

title: The SpaceX IPO made history. One month on has it lost momentum?
summary: One month after SpaceX's historic initial public offering, the company's stock performance raises questions about whether its momentum has stalled. The analysis examines how the market is valuing the company's current revenue streams and growth prospects.
content: A month on from the firm's stock market debut, the reality of how SpaceX currently makes money has seemed to come into clearer focus.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO创造历史。一个月后它失去了动力吗？
zh.summary: 在SpaceX具有历史意义的首次公开募股一个月后，该公司的股票表现引发了关于其势头是否已停滞的疑问。该分析研究了市场如何估值该公司当前的收入流和增长前景。

title: Demand for baby bank growing faster than donations
summary: A baby clothing and formula milk charity reports growing demand that exceeds donation levels, distributing 36,400 clothing items and 536 tubs of formula in 2025. The imbalance suggests increasing economic pressure on families with young children.
content: The charity says it gave out 36,400 items of child clothing and 536 tubs of formula milk in 2025.

zh.title: 婴儿银行需求增长速度快于捐赠
zh.summary: 一家婴儿服装和配方奶粉慈善机构报告称，需求增长超过了捐赠水平，在2025年分发了36,400件衣服和536罐配方奶粉。这种不平衡表明对有幼儿家庭的经济压力在增加。

title: US and Iran trade fire as tensions rise over Strait of Hormuz
summary: The U.S. military conducted fresh attacks, and Iran responded by striking American military bases in Kuwait, Jordan, and Bahrain within hours. The rapid escalation heightens concerns about regional destabilization and threatens critical shipping lanes in the Strait of Hormuz.
content: Within hours of fresh US attacks, Iran said it had struck US military bases in Kuwait, Jordan and Bahrain.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗交火，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势升级
zh.summary: 美国军方进行了新的攻击，伊朗在数小时内通过对科威特、约旦和巴林的美国军事基地发动袭击作出回应。这种快速升级加剧了人们对地区不稳定的担忧，并威胁了霍尔木兹海峡的关键航运通道。

title: SK Hynix shares slide 10% in Seoul after stellar Nasdaq debut
summary: SK Hynix's stock fell over 10% in Seoul on Monday following the chipmaker's strong Nasdaq debut. The decline reflects typical post-IPO profit-taking after the initial rally and strong opening performance.
content: SK Hynix Inc. shares tumbled over 10% in Seoul on Monday after the chipmaker's blockbuster Nasdaq debut.

zh.title: SK海力士纳斯达克首日表现抢眼后首尔股价下跌10%
zh.summary: SK海力士在周一纳斯达克首日表现强劲后，其首尔股价下跌超过10%。这反映了首次公开募股初期涨势后的典型获利回吐现象。

title: Stock futures slip after U.S., Iran exchange airstrikes again: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock index futures declined as traders assessed the latest escalation in U.S.-Iran military tensions in the Middle East. The market movement came as investors also prepared for upcoming corporate earnings reports.
content: Traders weighed the latest events in the Middle East and braced for a slew of corporate earnings reports due out later in the week.

zh.title: 美伊再次交换空袭后股指期货下滑：实时更新
zh.summary: 当交易员评估美伊在中东地区最新军事紧张局势升级时，美国股指期货下跌。市场波动同时也反映了投资者为即将公布的企业财报做准备。

title: Oil prices rise, stock futures dip after latest flare-up of strikes between U.S. and Iran
summary: Oil prices increased while U.S. stock-index futures fell following continued tit-for-tat military strikes between the U.S. and Iran around the Strait of Hormuz. The escalation raises concerns about potential disruptions to global energy supplies.
content: Oil prices rose and U.S. stock-index futures slipped on Sunday, after the U.S. and Iran continued their tit-for-tat attacks around the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend.

zh.title: 美伊最新冲突后油价上升，股指期货下跌
zh.summary: 在美国和伊朗围绕霍尔木兹海峡继续进行来回空袭后，油价上升，美国股指期货下跌。这一升级引发了对全球能源供应可能中断的担忧。

title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall, pneumonia
summary: Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell disclosed he suffered a fall and pneumonia during his recent unexplained absence. The disclosure provides clarity after an extended period without public appearances from the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.
content: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.

zh.title: 麦康奈尔在长期神秘缺席后提供健康更新；称他遭受跌倒和肺炎
zh.summary: 参议院少数党领袖米奇·麦康奈尔披露他在最近的神秘缺席期间遭受跌倒和肺炎。这一披露在美国参议院历史上任职时间最长的党派领袖长期没有公开露面后提供了澄清。

title: ‘Trump accounts’ are great — if you’re already rich
summary: Trump-branded financial accounts offer substantial benefits primarily for high-net-worth individuals, while providing limited value for most other people. The article examines why these investment vehicles may exacerbate wealth inequality rather than democratize financial opportunity.
content: They’re a poor deal for most other people.

zh.title: "特朗普账户"很不错——前提是你已经很富有
zh.summary: 特朗普品牌的金融账户主要为高净值个人提供了实质性的好处,而对大多数其他人的价值有限。该文章研究了为什么这些投资工具可能会加剧财富不平等,而不是民主化金融机会。

title: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
summary: Pokémon Go reaches its 10th anniversary with millions of players still actively engaged with the mobile game. Scopely executives emphasize the game's enduring appeal lies in its mission to bring people together.
content: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.

zh.title: 《精灵宝可梦GO》10周年，数百万玩家仍在努力"抓住它们"
zh.summary: 《精灵宝可梦GO》迎来10周年纪念，数百万玩家仍在积极参与这款手机游戏。Scopely高管强调该游戏经久不衰的吸引力在于其将人们聚集在一起的使命。
